arts.ttl: Boniface returns to Leverkusen squad for Atletico clash
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso has confirmed that Victor Boniface will make his long-awaited return to the Bayer Leverkusen squad for Tuesday's Champions League match against Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso comments on Real Madrid links: "My bond with Real is strong"
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso has broken silence on reports linking him with Real Madrid, which have resurfaced following reports that Carlo Ancelotti will be stepping down at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso comments on his future amid Real Madrid links

arts.ttl: 10 Champions League talking points as Liverpool eye history and Jurgen Klopp wants revenge
arts.sum: The Champions League returns on Tuesday after more than a month, with Liverpool currently leading the way and Manchester City at risk of missing out on the knockout stages

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso responds to Real Madrid rumours amid speculation over Carlo Ancelotti's future
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso responds to rumours linking him with the Real Madrid job following fresh reports regarding Carlo Ancelotti's future.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso responds to Real Madrid question after Carlo Ancelotti claims
